subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and firm believer! Though these times be oppressive, and though thou mayest find thyself without occupation for some days, yet remain thou hopeful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ثابت راسخ هر چند روزگار ستمکار است و ایامی چند شما بیکار ولی امیدوار
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
